texto: Idea 721. Lies always have a purpose
autor: but a truth has no such compulsion! The very purpose of lies is that they have to be told somewhere. Otherwise there arises no necessity to create them. The truth exists as it is
explicacao: Citação de but a truth has no such compulsion! The very purpose of lies is that they have to be told somewhere. Otherwise there arises no necessity to create them. The truth exists as it is sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Idea 721. Lies always have a purpose” articula reflexao, only-some-confess-and-others-do-not, always em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
